summary: WMS Redesigned Receiving and Picking Modules - Full testing complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified via Playwright. New Receiving form has all required fields (PO, Customer, Manufacturer, Style, Color, Description, Category, Country of Origin, Fabric Content, Location, Items with Size/Boxes/Units). Pick Ticket direct creation works with sizes grid (XS/S/M/L/XL/2X/3X/4X/5X). Order selection auto-fills Client and Quantity.
features_tested: Backend: POST /api/wms/receiving with new fields (customer, manufacturer, style, color, description, category, country_of_origin, fabric_content, inv_location, items with size/boxes/units_per_box) - PASS
Backend: Receiving creates boxes with correct fields (customer, manufacturer, style as sku, color, description, category, location, status) - PASS
Backend: Boxes have status 'stored' when inv_location provided, 'received' when no location - PASS
Backend: Receiving validation requires style and items - PASS
Backend: POST /api/wms/pick-tickets with direct creation (order_number, customer, client, manufacturer, style, color, quantity, sizes grid) - PASS
Backend: Pick ticket response includes total_pick_qty calculated from sizes - PASS
Backend: GET /api/wms/pick-tickets returns tickets with sizes field and all new attributes - PASS
Backend: Pick ticket validation requires order_number and style - PASS
Backend: POST /api/wms/pick-tickets still supports allocation_id for backward compatibility - PASS
Backend: All 9 sizes supported (XS, S, M, L, XL, 2X, 3X, 4X, 5X) - PASS
Backend: Partial sizes (only some provided) handled correctly - PASS
Backend: GET /api/wms/receiving returns records with new fields - PASS
Backend: All endpoints require authentication - PASS
Frontend: WMS page loads with sidebar navigation (11 modules) - PASS
Frontend: Receiving form has PO field (data-testid=rcv-po) - PASS

Frontend: Receiving form has Category field - PASS
Frontend: Receiving form has Country of Origin field - PASS
Frontend: Receiving form has Fabric Content field - PASS
Frontend: Receiving form has Location field (data-testid=rcv-location) - PASS
Frontend: Receiving form has Size dropdown with all 9 sizes (data-testid=rcv-size-0) - PASS
Frontend: Receiving form has Boxes and Units/Box fields - PASS
Frontend: Receiving form has 'Agregar size' link to add items - PASS
Frontend: Receiving form has Recibir and Cancelar buttons - PASS
Frontend: Receiving list shows records with customer, manufacturer/style/color info - PASS
Frontend: Picking form has PO/Orden dropdown (data-testid=pick-order-select) - PASS
Frontend: Picking form has Client auto field (data-testid=pick-client) - PASS
Frontend: Picking form has Quantity auto field (data-testid=pick-qty) - PASS
Frontend: Picking form has Customer field (data-testid=pick-customer) - PASS
Frontend: Picking form has Manufacturer field (data-testid=pick-manufacturer) - PASS
Frontend: Picking form has Style field (data-testid=pick-style) - PASS
Frontend: Picking form has Color field (data-testid=pick-color) - PASS
Frontend: Picking form has 'CANTIDADES POR SIZE' section with 9 size inputs (XS, S, M, L, XL, 2X, 3X, 4X, 5X) - PASS
Frontend: Picking form has Total Pick counter - PASS
Frontend: Picking form has 'Crear Pick Ticket' and Cancelar buttons - PASS
Frontend: Order selection auto-fills Client and Quantity from BLANKS order data - PASS (verified: ROCK REBEL, 176)
Frontend: Pick ticket list shows manufacturer, style, color tags - PASS
Frontend: Pick ticket list shows size breakdown badges (e.g., XS: 12, S: 36...) - PASS
Frontend: Pick ticket list shows Total count - PASS
Frontend: Pick ticket list has Print button and Confirmar button - PASS
Frontend: Pick ticket print opens popup with label-style layout (verified via code review: customer name, barcode via JsBarcode, 3x3 size grid, client/manufacturer/color info) - PASS (code verified)

issues: React hydration warnings about <span> elements inside <option>, <tbody>, <tr> - cosmetic issue from dev tooling, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Receiving endpoint correctly stores all new fields in both receiving doc and individual boxes
Location auto-creation works when inv_location is provided - creates location in wms_locations if not existing
Box status logic correct: 'stored' when location provided, 'received' when no location
Pick ticket direct creation properly calculates total_pick_qty from sizes object
Backward compatibility maintained - allocation_id still works for legacy flow
Pick ticket print HTML uses JsBarcode for barcode generation and has proper label-style layout with 3x3 size grid
Orders dropdown in Picking form fetches from BLANKS board only (correct filter)
seed_data_creation: Additional receiving records created during backend tests with new fields (customer='TEST_Customer_Inc', manufacturer='GILDAN', style, color, description, category). Additional pick tickets created with sizes grid.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WMS Redesigned Receiving and Picking modules fully tested. Receiving accepts: po, customer, manufacturer, style, color, description, category, country_of_origin, fabric_content, inv_location, items (each with size/boxes/units_per_box). Pick Tickets support DIRECT creation with: order_number, customer, client, manufacturer, style, color, quantity, sizes (object with XS/S/M/L/XL/2X/3X/4X/5X keys). Allocation-based pick ticket creation still works. Frontend forms have all data-testid attributes. Print popup uses JsBarcode for barcode generation. No mocked APIs.
